steps.title: Read the vertex from vertex form
steps.content: $y=-16(x-4.8)^2+432$ is in vertex form $a(x-h)^2+k$, so $(h,k)=(4.8,432)$ directly -- no algebra needed.

steps.title: Interpret the vertex
steps.content: Since $a=-16\lt0$, the parabola opens downward -- the vertex is the maximum. The drone reaches its maximum height of $432$ ft at $t=4.8$ seconds. That is the correct answer.
